title: ebenus ruminata
intro: Ebenus ruminata, also known as the red clover, is a perennial legume native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, with its flowers being a rich source of isoflavones. The medicinal properties of Ebenus ruminata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ebenus ruminata include reducing the risk of heart disease, menopausal symptoms, and osteoporosis, as well as supporting the immune system. Ebenus ruminata is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or supplement, and can also be consumed as a raw or cooked vegetable, with its leaves and flowers being edible and rich in nutrients.
